Best Contact Lens Clinic & Doctors in Kochi

At Giridhar Eye Institute in Kerala, our Contact Lens Clinic is dedicated to providing personalized solutions for individuals seeking alternative vision correction methods. Contact lenses offer a versatile and effective way to address a range of vision issues, from nearsightedness and farsightedness to astigmatism and presbyopia. Our clinic specializes in fitting and prescribing a wide variety of contact lenses, ensuring that each patient receives the best option for their unique visual needs and lifestyle. With our advanced technology and expertise, we aim to enhance your vision and comfort, offering a tailored approach to meet your individual preferences and requirements.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to frequently asked questions about binocular vision therapy, its benefits, and how it can improve your visual coordination.

Can I wear contact lenses if I have astigmatism?

Yes, specialized toric lenses are available for astigmatism, providing clear vision and comfort for affected individuals.

How do I know which contact lenses are right for me?

An eye care professional will assess your vision and lifestyle needs to recommend the best contact lens options.

How often should I replace my contact lenses?

Replacement frequency depends on the lens type: daily, bi-weekly, or monthly. Follow your eye care provider’s recommendations.

Can I sleep in my contact lenses?

Some lenses are designed for overnight wear, but always consult your eye care provider before sleeping in contacts.

What should I do if my contact lenses feel uncomfortable?

If discomfort occurs, remove the lenses immediately. Consult your eye care professional for guidance on proper lens care and fitting.

 

Are contact lenses safe for children?

Yes, many children can wear contact lenses safely, especially with proper guidance and responsibility regarding hygiene and care.

 

How do I clean and store my contact lenses?

Use a recommended cleaning solution and follow care instructions. Always store lenses in a clean case with fresh solution.

 

Can I wear makeup with contact lenses?

Yes, but apply makeup carefully and avoid products that can irritate your eyes. Always put in lenses before makeup application.
